subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabli-Ibrahim! God willing, mayest thou be the recipient of the grace of the True One, exalted be His majesty. The entire world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل ابراهیم انشاء الله بعنایت حق جل جلاله فائز باشی جمیع عالم از
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @proclamation to the people of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
